WN=256 S3: Higher arithmetic intensity per CTA despite imperfect N-tiling

WN=256 S3 SWIZZLE=8: Lower swizzle value

WN=192 S4 SWIZZLE=12: Perfect N tiling + grid swizzle
1p2c WN=128 S3 SWIZZLE=12: More consumer threads
PTX O3 optimization - compiler over-optimized shared memory access patterns
Larger tile M/K (128x128) - internal layouts not adapted
WARP_K=32 - larger inner K tile reduces occupancy
TMA swizzle=64 bits - worse bank conflict pattern
4-stage pipeline + swizzle - barrier deadlock from shared memory offset miscalcu
WARP_M=128 - increased register pressure reduces occupancy
WARP_M=32 - smaller M tile reduces arithmetic intensity per thread
maxrregcount=160 - register spilling hurts more than occupancy gain
Grid swizzle=15 - suboptimal L2 cache reuse pattern

WARP_N=128 to reduce bank conflicts - kernel internals hardcoded for 256
WARP_N=192 STAGES=3 - smem layout mismatch from stage reduction
ftz=true - no benefit for tensor core compute
Grid swizzle=9 - incompatible with M/N tile ratio
TMA swizzle=32 - worse shared memory layout
